questionHtml: Suggest a reason that the Winkler Method used to measure biochemical oxygen demand (BOD) must be done at constant temperature.
markschemeHtml:
rate of reaction of oxygen with impurities depends on temperature
OR
rate at which bacteria/organisms grow/respire depends on temperature ✔

meta.title: Suggest a reason that the Winkler Method used to measure biochemical oxygen demand (BOD) must be done at constant temperature.
